features: Fitted with 10mm super bass ferrite magnet drivers
1.2m lead with a 3.5mm stereo jack plug
description: From the manufacturer AV:Link | Stereo In-ear earphones EC9W In-ear Stereo Earphones, the perfect companion for your audio experience. These earphones have been meticulously designed to provide exceptional sound quality, lightweight comfort, and a seamless fit. Crafted with soft silicone earbuds, these in-ear earphones ensure a snug and comfortable fit, allowing you to enjoy your favorite music for hours on end. The 10mmØ super bass ferrite magnetic drivers deliver clear and full sound, enhancing your audio experience and immersing you in the music. Equipped with a 1.2m lead and a 3.5mm stereo jack plug, these earphones are compatible with a wide range of audio devices, ensuring versatility and convenience. You can easily connect them to your smartphone, tablet, laptop, or MP3 player, and enjoy high-quality sound wherever you go. To cater to your individual preferences, we provide spare earbuds, allowing you to customize the fit and ensure an optimal listening experience. Simply choose the earbuds that suit you best and enjoy a comfortable and personalized fit. FEATURES: Fitted with 10mmØ super bass ferrite magnetic drivers Produce clear and full sound 1.2m lead with a 3.5mm stereo jack plug Spare earbuds included SPECIFICATION: Lead length: 1.2m Power: 100mW Connector: 3.5mm stereo jack Speaker size: 10mmØ Frequency response: 20Hz-20kHz Impedance: 32 Ohms Sensitivity: 98dB @ 1kHz Dimensions: 22 x 9 x 129mm Weight: 42g
